prompt: A person looking through binoculars turned backwards -- zooming out from individual trees to see the whole forest. The trees have numbers on them, and floating above the forest are summary statistics: COUNT, AVG, SUM.
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. A person looking through binoculars turned backwards -- zooming out from individual trees to see the whole forest. The trees have numbers on them, and floating above the forest are summary statistics: COUNT, AVG, SUM. Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
